final:
module eeprom (
    input [4:0] data_in,
    input write_enable,
    input read_enable,
    output reg [4:0] data_out
);
    reg [4:0] stored_data;

    always @(*) begin
  if (write_enable) begin stored_data = data_in ; end
  end

  always @(*) begin
  if (read_enable) begin data_out = stored_data ; end
  end
endmodule
